side_effects_for_other_atoms: Migration sets canonical precedent for in-flight steward promotions: ATOM-0036 (file_directory), ATOM-0040 (north_star), and the agent currently on ATOM-0032 (open_problems) all have a concrete pattern to follow at LEDGERS/BOXES/<box>/steward/. The unified Box has 6 required files: box.json, BOX.md, steward/AGENTS.md, steward/prompt.md, steward/config.json, receipts/.
